en.patina: Checks historical novels for anachronisms — with DWDS evidence and your final call.
en.velosia: Snap a photo: AI drafts listings and fills Kleinanzeigen and Vinted via app or extension.
en.schnappster: Monitors classified searches, scores new listings with AI, and alerts you to real bargains.
en.hugur: Notes, links, and ideas in one searchable stream — browser, extension, and Android.
en.tile-weave: Generate fabric patterns with AI, check tile seams, preview them on 3D garments.
en.suntino: Chrome extension: summarize pages, YouTube, and PDFs in the side panel.
en.luhambo: GPS routes as 3D flythroughs with photo stops — open map data, Relive-style.
en.cimdata-kurse: Filter CIMDATA courses by start date, build a study plan, share via link.
en.echt-oder-ki: Daily duel: spot AI fakes in text and images — three levels, leaderboards.
en.komorebi: Find conservation roles worldwide — discover on a map, filter, apply directly.
en.quality-touch: Guided connection space for couples — touch, deep talks, even at a distance.
en.patina-kampagne: Campaign hub for Patina: podcast, season planning, and film concepts in one place.
en.a11y-quiz: WCAG 2.2 quiz in ChatGPT with personal results and an accessible dashboard.
